# Category Page Template

> A reusable template for category pages such as **SSC Jobs**, **Railway Jobs**, **Bank Jobs**, **Police Jobs**, **Teaching Jobs**, **Engineering Jobs**, **Medical Jobs**, or **State Government Jobs**.

Replace all placeholders (`{{ }}`) before publishing.

---

# {{ Category Name }}

Example:

```
SSC Jobs 2026 – Latest Notifications, Eligibility, Vacancies & Apply Online
```

---

# Overview

Provide a short introduction explaining:

- What this category covers
- Who should use it
- Types of recruitment included
- Update frequency

Example:

```
This page provides the latest SSC recruitment notifications including CGL, CHSL, MTS, GD, JE, and other Staff Selection Commission examinations. Candidates can find eligibility, vacancies, important dates, and official notification links.
```

---

# Quick Information

| Field | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Category | {{ Category Name }} |
| Recruiting Organization | {{ Organization }} |
| Application Mode | Online / Offline |
| Job Location | {{ Location }} |
| Official Website | {{ URL }} |
| Last Updated | {{ Date }} |

---

# What You Will Find

This category includes:

- Latest Notifications
- Upcoming Recruitment
- Admit Cards
- Results
- Syllabus
- Answer Keys
- Previous Papers
- Official Notifications

# Recruitment Process

A typical recruitment process may include:

1. Notification
2. Online Application
3. Written Examination
4. Skill Test (if applicable)
5. Document Verification
6. Final Selection

The actual process depends on the recruiting organization.

# Recommended Structured Data

Depending on the page content, consider:

- CollectionPage
- BreadcrumbList
- WebPage
- Article
- FAQPage (where applicable)

Structured data should accurately reflect the visible content.

---

# Internal Linking

Link to:

- Parent category
- Subcategories
- Latest recruitment
- Admit cards
- Results
- Syllabus
- Previous papers
- Related categories

---

# SEO Checklist

- [ ] Unique page title
- [ ] Meta description
- [ ] Canonical URL
- [ ] One H1 heading
- [ ] Logical heading hierarchy
- [ ] Internal links
- [ ] Breadcrumb navigation
- [ ] Structured data
- [ ] Mobile-friendly layout

---

# GEO Checklist

- [ ] Category clearly defined
- [ ] Main entities identified
- [ ] Official references included
- [ ] Related topics linked
- [ ] Content updated regularly

---

# AEO Checklist

- [ ] Main questions answered
- [ ] FAQ section included
- [ ] Tables improve readability
- [ ] Answers are concise
- [ ] Important information appears early

---

# Final Review

Before publishing:

- [ ] Recruitment list verified
- [ ] Dates updated
- [ ] Official links checked
- [ ] Internal links tested
- [ ] Structured data validated
- [ ] Mobile layout reviewed
- [ ] Proofreading completed

---

# Revision History

| Version | Date | Notes |
|----------|------|-------|
| 1.0 | {{ Date }} | Initial publication |
| 1.1 | {{ Date }} | Recruitment update |

---

# Disclaimer

This template is intended to provide a consistent structure for category pages.

Always verify recruitment information against official notifications and update the page as new information becomes available.
